# Gas Property Modeling

**Summary**: The modeling of gas behavior using pseudo-critical parameters.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] developed correlations for gas pseudo-critical pressure and temperature.

## Scientific Context

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] Required for calculating the real gas deviation factor (Z-factor).

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] Calculated from gas composition or relative density.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- New pseudo-critical property correlations are more accurate than existing ones. ([[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990, p. 18]])
